varieties.name: Standard Moringa oleifera (Indian Type)
varieties.origin: Northern India (Himalayan foothills), cultivation history 2000+ years
varieties.yield_notes: 300-1000 pods per tree annually depending on care
varieties.availability: Available from Brisbane nurseries (Fruitopia Nursery, Ladybird Nursery), Daley's Fruit Tree Nursery

varieties.name: Moringa stenopetala (African Moringa)
varieties.origin: Ethiopian Highlands, Kenya (African native species)
varieties.yield_notes: Lower pod yield but superior leaf production, longevity 60-100 years

varieties.name: PKM-1 (Periyakulam-1)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Periyakulam, India - released 1989
varieties.yield_notes: 200-225 pods per tree annually, first harvest 160-170 days

varieties.name: PKM-2 (Periyakulam-2)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Periyakulam, India
varieties.yield_notes: 98 tonnes/hectare (220 pods per tree, 61.65kg per tree annually)

varieties.name: ODC-3
varieties.origin: Indian Agri Farm, India - released 2017
varieties.yield_notes: 300 pods per tree, 25-30 tonnes/acre, flowers twice yearly
varieties.growing_notes: 3-4 months from sowing, harvest at 6 months

varieties.name: Standard Moringa oleifera 🌱
varieties.origin: Native to Indian subcontinent, cultivated since ancient times
varieties.yield_notes: 300-1000 pods depending on variety and care

varieties.name: Jaffna Moringa (Yazhpanam Type) 🏆
varieties.origin: Jaffna region, Sri Lanka - introduced to South India centuries ago
varieties.yield_notes: 40 pods in year 2, increasing to 600 pods/tree from year 3 onwards

varieties.name: Chavakacheri Muringa 🏆
varieties.origin: Jaffna type ecotype from Sri Lanka/South India

varieties.name: Pal Muringa (Palmurungai) 🏆
varieties.origin: Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu (bordering Kerala)

varieties.name: Puna Muringa (Punamurungai) 🏆
varieties.origin: Traditional South Indian variety

varieties.name: Kodikal Muringa (Kodikalmurungai) 🏆
varieties.origin: Trichy district, Tamil Nadu (traditional South Indian variety)

varieties.name: MO-70 (Kerala Agricultural University) 🧬
varieties.origin: Kerala Agricultural University, Vellanikkara - developed through breeding program
varieties.availability: Kerala Agricultural University, state agricultural departments

varieties.name: MO-95 (Kerala Agricultural University) 🧬
varieties.origin: Kerala Agricultural University, Vellanikkara
varieties.availability: Kerala Agricultural University, state agricultural departments

varieties.name: MO-44 (Kerala Agricultural University) 🧬
varieties.origin: Kerala Agricultural University, Vellanikkara
varieties.availability: Kerala Agricultural University, state agricultural departments

varieties.name: AD-4 (Annual Drumstick-4) 🧬
varieties.origin: Kerala Agricultural University, Vellanikkara
varieties.availability: Kerala Agricultural University, state agricultural departments

varieties.name: PKM-1 (Tamil Nadu variety)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Periyakulam - released 1989

varieties.name: PKM-2 (Tamil Nadu variety)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Periyakulam

varieties.name: Coimbatore-1
varieties.origin: Kerala Agricultural University / Tamil Nadu
varieties.yield_notes: Two harvests per year, productive for 8-10 years

varieties.name: Coimbatore-2 (CO-2)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu - more popular than Coimbatore-1 in Tamil Nadu and Kerala border areas
varieties.yield_notes: 350-500 pods per plant annually, higher yield than CO-1

varieties.name: Bhagya (KDM-1)
varieties.origin: KRC College of Horticulture, Arabhavi, Karnataka - released 2011
varieties.yield_notes: 350-400 pods first year, 800-1000 pods second year, productive for 15 years

varieties.name: ODC-3
varieties.origin: Indian Agri Farm - released 2017
varieties.growing_notes: 3-4 months, harvest at 6 months, flowers twice yearly

varieties.name: Rohit-1
varieties.origin: North Maharashtra (Nashik region), developed by farmer Balasaheb Marale
varieties.yield_notes: 40-135 pods initially, 585-650 pods (45-50kg) per year after 5 years, productive 10 years

varieties.name: KM-1 (Kudumianmalai-1)
varieties.origin: Anna Pannai, Kudumianmalai, Pudukottai district, Tamil Nadu
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu sources, some Kerala suppliers

varieties.name: Dhanraj (S-6/4)
varieties.origin: KRC College of Agriculture, UAS, Arabhavi, Karnataka

varieties.name: Moolanur (Perennial Ecotype) 🏆
varieties.origin: Traditional Tamil Nadu variety (cultivated by farmers)

varieties.name: Valayapatti (Perennial Ecotype) 🏆
varieties.origin: Usilampatti and Andipatti regions, Tamil Nadu
